description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees and other greenery. The structure features a flat roof with multiple sections, some of which have solar panels and pergolas, and a mix of white and beige exterior walls. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a swimming pool in the backyard, and several outdoor living spaces such as patios and covered terraces. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and views of the garden. The house is set within a rectangular lot bordered by trees, offering privacy and a sense of seclusion. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a garage, and a swimming pool, surrounded by palm trees and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and a landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, garage, and solar panels on the roof, with more of the backyard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and extensive greenery along the back of the house.
description_view_3: Side-rear view emphasizing the pool, outdoor living spaces, and the integration of the house with the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, a small covered porch, and is flanked by landscaped greenery and a paved path.
